acceptanceCriteria: Malformed, unsupported, contradictory, and evidence-free assessments fail closed at parse.
A low-confidence assessment produces an explicit review/escalation routing outcome instead of silently selecting the economy class.
Pure routing remains deterministic for identical inputs.
Existing v1 routing inputs and recorded plans remain compatible via an explicit migration path.
Risk from preflight stays separate from required capability.
Tests cover assessment boundary cases and v1 backward compatibility.
Orchestration documentation defines the trust treatment of assessment evidence.
constraints: Do not invoke any model from the deterministic CLI.
Do not let an assessor directly choose a candidate.
Do not claim confidence is a calibrated probability.
Do not weaken, skip, or delete existing tests.
Do not change protected paths, public CLI command surface, or security boundaries.
Confidence and evidence semantics must be deterministic and reviewable, not verified facts.
stopConditions: a required check fails twice without a new hypothesis
